examples: The UAR is a database which holds information about unclaimed money in more than 50 companies like The Prudential, Standard Life and BT.
With the insurance industry itself giving only limited help to customers to find old policies, a commercial company has stepped into the breach - the Unclaimed Assets Register (UAR).
"The Argentinian Rugby Union (UAR) has made a commitment to have their players contracted to the union and for the majority of their players to be based in Argentina by 2012, " said the IRB.
